contract_claim: Method is named `getOrCreateVariableReference` implying it may return an existing reference for existing data, but it ALWAYS creates a new reference (increments `nextVariableReference` every call, no lookup by content). Called twice per `handleScopes` invocation, producing 2 new unreclaimable entries each time.
observed_behavior: Method is named `getOrCreateVariableReference` implying it may return an existing reference for existing data, but it ALWAYS creates a new reference (increments `nextVariableReference` every call, no lookup by content). Called twice per `handleScopes` invocation, producing 2 new unreclaimable entries each time.
